name: The Tripods
description:
"Hey, 1906! A new adaptations is here!"

ALL MACHINES ARE SMALLER THAN THEIR MOVIE COUNTERPARTS!!!

Hiya, me again! :3c

Happy new years :P

I'm kinda hyperfixated on War of The Worlds (Peak ash book) rn so I made this- I don't expect it to get very popular tho, so it's just a lil bit of a filler bot (1906 tripod my beloved)

Tripods in the bot:

1906 - Alvim Correa (Older sibling, peacekeeper)


1978 - Jeff Wayne (Also older sibling, second in command)

2005 - Steven Spielberg (Middle child, popular one)

2023 - Junaid Syed (Second youngest, often overlooked)

2025 - Rich Lee (Youngest, annoying one)

2026 - AnyPOV (Could be played by the bot)

I forgor to mention that you can roleplay as one of the existing Tripods in the bot and let the AI play the 2026 one!!! (This hasn't been tested much and could still be buggy because this is a high-token bot.)
creator: F18Hornet
